category_sources: source_facts.description says JAGS is for Bayesian MCMC simulation; official JAGS homepage describes analysis of Bayesian hierarchical models using Markov Chain Monte Carlo.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading is JAGS; SourceForge project title is "JAGS: Just Another Gibbs Sampler".
docs_sources: Official SourceForge Manuals/4.x folder lists the user manual and installation manual PDFs.
repo_sources: Official JAGS homepage states the source code is hosted in a Mercurial repository at SourceForge; SourceForge project exposes the Code Mercurial tree.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Bayesian MCMC; official homepage lists cross-platform BUGS-language engine, extensibility, and experimentation in Bayesian modelling.
